scripts.dist:win: vite build && electron-packager . "Nexans Affiche" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --asar --out=dist-electron --overwrite --ignore="^/(?!dist|electron|package\.json)" && cp electron/launcher.bat "dist-electron/Lancer Nexans Affiche.bat" && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path 'dist-electron\\Nexans Affiche-win32-x64','dist-electron\\Lancer Nexans Affiche.bat' -DestinationPath dist-electron\\NexansAffiche-win-x64.zip -Force"
